name: aura

descFull: AURA is an agentic harness that turns an LLM model into a reliable, autonomous service capable of executing real SRE work. AURA provides the guardrails, API servers, state management, authentication, streaming, error handling, and tool integrations necessary to run AI SRE agents safely in production.
